unresolved_issues: No local normalized appendix exists for complete FOC verification.
The paper describes the Smets-Wouters-type robustness model compactly and does not print all medium-scale equations in the MinerU Markdown.
Several dynamic FOCs and Phillips curves are marked implementation_cross_check/needs_review.
